content: Phase 1: Copy backend files (server.py, routes/, models/, services/, utils/, templates/, config.py, data files, audio_prompts/)
Phase 2: Copy frontend files (src/App.js, App.css, components/, pages/, contexts/, hooks/, utils/, index files)
Phase 3: Copy frontend public files and config files (tailwind, craco, postcss, etc.)
Phase 6: Configure environment variables and restart services
Phase 7: Verify backend starts without errors
Phase 8: Verify frontend compiles without errors
Phase 9: End-to-end testing with testing agent
